config.name: Metabolic Inversion: The Oxygen Attack
config.hypothesis: Environmental hostility failed to induce collapse because it attacks weather, not oxygen. The emergent population constant (~46) reflects metabolic equilibrium where birth = death. Metabolic inversion breaks this by making reproduction prohibitively expensive. At some replication_cost_multiplier, agents cannot accumulate enough ATP to reproduce, demographic replacement fails, and the population collapses. This experiment maps the metabolic boundary of the attractor.

findings: NO COLLAPSE: 0 of 180 worlds survived at all multiplier levels
Metabolic inversion up to 5.0x (125 ATP) insufficient to break attractor
The metabolic boundary, if it exists, lies beyond 5.0x replication cost
